executiveSummary: Partial run (22/32 cells) due to 2 runner crashes. 8 passes from 22 completed cells (36%). Claude at 58% (7/12), Copilot at 10% (1/10). Notable: first Copilot pass in 2+ days (S2-C-copilot with Azure Skills). All D-strategy cells missing due to crashes.
gaReadiness: Not ready. Copilot still timing out on 9/10 cells. Only Strategy C with Skills produces a Copilot pass. Claude is solid on LangGraph (S3) and Migration (S4) but still struggles with Greenfield MAF (S1) A/C strategies.

rootCauses.title: Copilot timeout regression
rootCauses.description: 9/10 Copilot cells timeout or fail. Copilot's --yolo mode gets killed after 14-27 minutes. Duration range: 443-1654s. Consistent with prior nights but worse than May 16.
rootCauses.proposedFix: Investigate Copilot CLI startup overhead, folder trust prompts, and MCP server init. Consider increasing timeout or pre-warming.

rootCauses.title: Claude timeout on A/C strategies for S1/S2
rootCauses.description: Claude hits timeout on open-ended strategies. Gets stuck in azd provision spinner loops or repetitive init retries. Agent reasoning shows good intent but execution gets bogged down.
rootCauses.proposedFix: Add explicit timeout handling in prompts. Consider shorter provision timeout with retry logic.

rootCauses.title: Runner process instability
rootCauses.description: Runner crashed twice in one night (after 20 cells, then after 22). 10 cells never ran. No OOM evidence in dmesg. Likely resource exhaustion from 4 concurrent Copilot sessions.
rootCauses.proposedFix: Reduce worker concurrency from 4 to 2 for Copilot-heavy batches. Add memory watchdog. Hal should investigate.

highlights.title: Copilot S2-C-copilot breakthrough
highlights.detail: First Copilot pass in 2+ days. Strategy C (Azure Skills) enabled the agent to discover Foundry-Features header, manually create toolbox via REST API, and build Dockerfile from scratch when azd scaffolding failed. Proves Skills + Copilot CAN work.

highlights.title: Claude S3 (LangGraph) perfect
highlights.detail: S3-A, S3-B, S3-C all pass for Claude. LangGraph scenario is most mature.

highlights.title: Copilot regression from 44% to 10%
highlights.detail: May 16 had 7/16 Copilot passes. May 17 has 1/10. All failures are timeouts. Something changed in Copilot's execution environment or the MCP server setup.

skillsDelta.note: D-strategy cells (doc-pointed + Skills) never ran due to runner crashes. Only partial C-strategy data available. S2-C-copilot pass vs S2-A-copilot/S2-B-copilot timeout suggests Skills help significantly for Copilot on scenario 2.

newPasses: S2-C-copilot (NEW — first Copilot pass with Skills)
newFailures: Copilot timeout regression across all scenarios
